• Minimum QualificationsBachelor's Degree or foreign equivalent in Information Systems, Engineering (any), Mathematics, or related field.
• Experience and/or education must include:Utilize Swift language and Objective-C language to build modern applications & frameworks for Apple’s OS platforms (iOS, watchOS, visionOS, tvOS).
• Prototyping new ideas to help with initial feature definition using Swift, SwiftUI, Xcode, and visual design applications.
• Participating in architecture and code reviews to determine the ideal design for new software.
• Performance and multithreading tools and concepts, including Grand Central Dispatch (Objective-C) and Dispatch (Swift).
• Debugging tools, including reviewing software and crash logs to pinpoint issues in software.
• Performance monitoring and tooling to help validate app scroll performance, app stability, app launch time, and network performance.
• Using continuous integration tools (CI) to build, test, and deploy software.

• Minimum QualificationsMaster's Degree or foreign equivalent in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field and 2 years of experience in the job offered or related occupation2 years of experience in each of the following skills is requiredDebugging complex system issues reported during SW development, HW Bring Up and from Factory Production LinesUsing tools including LLDB, JTAG, Python, C/C++ and Cellular test equipment for firmware and hardware functionality testing.
• Developing SW components communicating with hardware, host computers and mobile devicesUtilizing C/C++ for source code reviews, including analysis of various code paths to create granular and extensive test plansUtilizing Python programming including the development of test automation framework and test suites for firmware quality testingUsing C/C++ to implement firmware and software for Embedded SW/FW applicationsExperience with scripting languages and tools: Shell, Git and Object Oriented ProgrammingExperience in testing software system functionality using Windows and/or MacOS, Jenkins and automated builds.

• Minimum QualificationsMaster’s degree or foreign equivalent in Information Technology, Mathematics, Computer Science or related field and 2 years of experience in the job offered or related occupation.
• Experience and/or education must include:Utilizing containerization technologies including Docker to manage and deploy services.
• 1 year of experience with each of the following skills is required:Utilizing Splunk for log storage and analysis.
• Experience in data visualization, including formatting analytics data, and experience presenting data to senior engineers.
• Experience with scripting languages and tools, specifically Shell, Git, and Python.
• 2 years of experience with each of the following skills is required:Utilizing Golang, JavaScript and C++ to design and develop multi-language codebases.
• Experience with a ticketing system for tracking project timelines, progress and assigning tasks.
• Utilizing JavaScript to implement real time collaboration features for the web.
